message:
web: Add inline editable title for transcript owners and admins

- Add updateTitle server function to update transcript summary
- Create EditableTitle component with hover-to-show pencil icon
- Save on Enter, cancel on Escape or blur
- Show loading spinner for minimum 200ms during save
- Only owners and admins can edit the title

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/mhz67wy3exmm7oy0xkg4vn0r
